rootCause: Normal validation commands routed through nested npm/npx and legacy ESLint interop paths. On newer Node/npm combinations, npm's debug package requires supports-color as an ES module, and @eslint/eslintrc requires svelte-eslint-parser as an ES module, causing repeated Node ExperimentalWarning blocks even when validation passed.
resolution: Replaced the noisy nested npm/npx validation paths with direct Node/binary invocations and added a narrow output filter for the two known third-party ExperimentalWarning blocks while preserving command exit codes and all other stderr/stdout output.
